PHASE:        Phase 8 Batch 3 — Sub-batch 1 (Event Detail Modal) COMPLETE and merged to origin/main (commit 3a3b7ae). Phase 8 Batch 2 also fully shipped (SSE-3 merged earlier this session at commit 5b3ef4d). Two sub-batches remain in Batch 3 — paused at user request, resume next session.

LAST_DONE:    Phase 8 Batch 3 Sub-batch 1 (Event Detail Modal) shipped via squash-merge to main (commit 3a3b7ae, pushed to origin). Three sub-task commits consolidated:
              - 1.1 (9fd10c3): tRPC backend — event.update + event.addAccompanyingRanger + event.removeAccompanyingRanger procedures on apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/event.ts. All tenant-scoped. event.update uses .strict() schema with NOT_FOUND on count=0. addAccompanyingRanger has XOR refinement (registeredUserId XOR freetextName). removeAccompanyingRanger verifies tenant ownership before delete. Tests +12.
              - 1.2 (dcfe3bd): UI components — apps/web/src/components/events/{event-detail-modal,accompanying-rangers-input,event-timeline}.tsx (+2 test files). Modal uses shadcn Dialog with title/priority/details(offender/vessel/registration/address/action)/notes-textarea/coordinates/rangers/timeline. AccompanyingRangersInput is dual-mode chip UI (registered user search via user.list + freetext add). Events page wires modal via Maximize2 icon button on each KanbanCard (onPointerDown+onClick stopPropagation so dnd-kit drag still works). Tests +11.
              - 1.3 (71d33cc): EarthRanger push-back — apps/web/src/server/lib/earthranger-push.ts (self-contained PATCH helper, NOT imported from packages/jobs to keep web bundle lean). Wired into event.update mutation as best-effort try/catch; never fails local mutation. Maps {title, priority, eventDetails} → ER {title, priority, event_details}. Tests +8 (6 push-helper + 2 router integration covering happy path + 502 graceful degradation).
              Test deltas across the sub-batch: 140 → 171 (+31). All gates: typecheck ✅ lint ✅ test 171/171 ✅ build ✅. Two-stage review (Rule 25) passed both stages. Also shipped earlier same session: SSE-3 (commit 5b3ef4d — closes Phase 8 Batch 2).

NEXT:         Sub-batch 2 — Ranger Detail page (`/rangers/[id]`). PRODUCT.md scope: profile header, event summary (reported + accompanied breakdown), foot/seaborne KPI cards (patrols/km/hours), recent activity timeline. Depends on AccompanyingRanger data shipped in Sub-batch 1. Estimate Tier 2 (~8-10 files, ~50K tokens).
